package.name: mserve_base
package.description: Command arbiter and safety gate for mServe. Subscribes to /cmd_vel, applies robot-level speed limits and a dead-man-switch timeout, converts the result to per-wheel motor commands via differential-drive kinematics, and forwards them to mserve_drivechain's ~/drive service. Owns wheel geometry and kinematics — mserve_drivechain stays a pure motor driver.
